questions.title: The concept of acting in aid of civil powers by the Armed forces has been laid down in the constitutions of Pakistan 1973?
questions.explanation:
• The concept of Armed Forces acting in aid of civil powers is in Article 245 of the Constitution of Pakistan (1973).
  • It allows the military to assist civil authorities when required.
  • This is used in situations like emergencies, law and order, or disaster control.
  • It defines the role of armed forces under civilian government.

questions.title: Which forests act as barriers against cyclones?
questions.explanation:
• Mangrove forests act as barriers against cyclones.
  • Mangroves reduce erosion by trapping sediments, stabilizing the coastal zone and thus protecting the coast from storm surges and cyclones.
  • Mangroves in Pakistan are found along the coastline of Sindh and Balochistan.
